models.name: Tinyllama
models.description: Compact 1.1B model. Great for testing and quick Q&A on very low-end hardware.

models.name: SmolLM2 1.7B
models.description: Compact 1.7B model by HuggingFace. Better quality than TinyLlama for edge devices.

models.name: Gemma 3 1B
models.description: Google's smallest Gemma 3 model. Surprisingly capable for its tiny size.

models.name: Llama 3.2 1B
models.description: Meta's ultra-light 1B model. Fast responses, good for basic tasks.

models.name: Nomic Embed Text
models.description: Fast text embedding model. Outperforms OpenAI text-embedding-3-small on most benchmarks. Ideal for RAG.

models.name: mxbai Embed Large
models.description: High-quality 1024-dim embedding model by Mixedbread AI. Top-tier retrieval accuracy for RAG pipelines.

models.name: Moondream 2
models.description: Tiny but capable vision model. Image understanding at minimal resource cost.

models.name: Gemma 2 2B
models.description: Google's lightweight 2B model. Fastest CPU inference in its class. Solid general-purpose assistant.

models.name: Llama 3.2 3B
models.description: Meta's efficient 3B model. Most downloaded model on Ollama. Balanced speed and quality.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 3B
models.description: Alibaba's multilingual 3B model. Strong coding and conversation. Best non-English support at this size.

models.name: Qwen 3 1.7B
models.description: Latest-gen Qwen with hybrid thinking mode. Impressive reasoning for its tiny size.

models.name: Phi-3 Mini
models.description: Microsoft's 3.8B model. Strong reasoning and coding for its size. 128K context is exceptional at 4GB RAM.

models.name: Phi-4 Mini
models.description: Microsoft's Phi-4-mini. Matches Llama 3.1 8B on MMLU using 40% less RAM. Supports function calling and math.

models.name: DeepSeek R1 1.5B
models.description: Distilled reasoning model with visible chain-of-thought thinking. Best reasoning model under 4GB RAM.

models.name: Starcoder2 3B
models.description: BigCode's 3B model trained on 600+ programming languages. Excellent for fill-in-the-middle code completion.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 3B
models.description: Qwen's code-specialized 3B model. Best small coding model available. Supports FIM completion across 92 languages.

models.name: Qwen 3 VL 2B
models.description: Compact Qwen vision-language model. Solid image understanding with an impressive 256K context.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 VL 3B
models.description: Compact Qwen vision-language model. Strong image understanding and reasoning at 4GB RAM.

models.name: Llava Phi-3 3.8B
models.description: Lightweight multimodal model fine-tuned from Phi-3 Mini. Good image+text chat on just 4GB RAM.

models.name: Qwen 3 4B
models.description: Latest Qwen 4B with hybrid thinking mode. Punches well above its size — rivals older 7B models on reasoning and code.

models.name: Gemma 3 4B
models.description: Google's 4B multimodal model. Strong reasoning and vision support with a 128K context window.

models.name: Qwen 3 VL 4B
models.description: Balanced Qwen vision-language model. Best vision+reasoning combo at the 6GB RAM tier.
